value_proposition: Help residential and commercial buyers understand savings, installation readiness, and financing options quickly, then move into a quote conversation without friction.
conversion_goals: Qualify leads through AI chat before human handoff

routes.label: Home
routes.user_intent: Understand solar value fast and start a conversation.
routes.conversion_goal: Push visitors into quote request, WhatsApp, or call within the first screen and again after proof.

seo.title: Solar Installation Services for Homes and Businesses | HelioRise Solar
seo.description: Get a fast solar quote, compare financing options, and reach HelioRise Solar by WhatsApp, phone, or AI chat.

routes.label: Residential Solar
routes.user_intent: Evaluate rooftop solar for a home with clarity on savings, process, and support.
routes.conversion_goal: Capture homeowner leads with roof and energy-bill qualification.

seo.title: Residential Solar Installation | HelioRise Solar
seo.description: See how HelioRise Solar plans, installs, and supports rooftop solar for homeowners.

routes.label: Commercial Solar
routes.user_intent: Evaluate commercial solar based on savings, rollout complexity, and project reliability.
routes.conversion_goal: Move commercial leads into discovery calls and site survey requests.

seo.title: Commercial Solar Installation | HelioRise Solar
seo.description: Plan commercial solar projects with phased deployment, financing support, and direct access to HelioRise Solar specialists.

routes.label: Financing and Incentives
routes.user_intent: Understand cost, payback, financing, and incentive pathways before talking to sales.
routes.conversion_goal: Reduce price objection and redirect to quote or advisor contact.

seo.title: Solar Financing and Incentives | HelioRise Solar
seo.description: Learn how financing, incentives, and expected payback shape your solar investment.

routes.label: Contact
routes.user_intent: Reach the team immediately through the fastest available channel.
routes.conversion_goal: Maximize direct contact starts through call, WhatsApp, AI handoff, and quote form submission.

seo.title: Contact HelioRise Solar
seo.description: Call, chat on WhatsApp, or send a quote request to HelioRise Solar.

rendering_strategy.page_strategy: server-first marketing pages with client islands for AI chat, sticky contact controls, estimator interactions, and form submission states

runtime_root_requirements: site-header with call and WhatsApp actions
AI assistant dock on home, residential, commercial, financing, and contact pages
lead quote form with visible success and failure states
reduced-motion fallbacks for all animated contact and reveal surfaces
accessibility_requirements: All call, WhatsApp, and chat controls must have explicit aria-labels
Lead forms must preserve label, error, and keyboard focus discipline
Sticky contact bars must remain reachable without obscuring main content
AI assistant must provide a keyboard-operable open and close path
Reduced motion must disable non-essential entrance and dock animations
